title: SoA Table Resolved Schema
description: Schema for a validated, identified, and relationship-resolved SoA table. Takes extraction output and makes it precise: stable identifiers for every element, explicit parent-child relationships, resolved annotation cross-references, and validated structural integrity. Still represents the table as it appears in the protocol - not yet study logic semantics. Prepares the table for integration with other tables and eventual mapping to study-schedule-logic. Key principle: Everything derivable from extraction is now derived; everything that needs validation is validated; every element is addressable.

table_metadata.description: Enhanced table metadata with resolution tracking. Inherits from extraction, adds resolution context.

table_id.description: Stable identifier for this table (e.g., 'table-001'). Generated during resolution. Used for cross-referencing in multi-table protocols.

table_number.description: Sequential table number from source protocol (1, 2, 3...). Preserved from extraction.

table_type.description: Classification preserved from extraction (v4). Determines consolidation strategy in Layer 3.

table_title.description: Table title as written in source document. Preserved from extraction.

table_purpose.description: Description of table scope. Preserved or enhanced from extraction.

continuation_of.description: If this table continues another, the table_id it continues. Resolved from table_number reference in extraction.

track_label.description: Short population/phase identifier for track tables. Preserved from extraction.

column_count.description: Total number of columns in table. Derived during resolution for validation.

row_count.description: Total number of rows in table. Derived during resolution for validation.

header_row_count.description: Number of schedule property (header) rows. Derived from schedule_properties array.

activity_row_count.description: Number of activity rows. Derived from activities array.

notes.description: Notes from extraction plus any resolution notes

schedule_property.description: A resolved schedule property with stable ID and explicit hierarchical relationships.

property_id.description: Stable identifier for this schedule property (e.g., 'prop-001'). Generated sequentially by row_position within table.

row_position.description: Physical row position preserved from extraction

property_type.description: Domain classification. Validated during resolution - must be assigned (no null).

property_comment.description: Human explanation of this property. Validated non-empty during resolution.

hierarchical_level.description: Position in header hierarchy. Validated during resolution - must be assigned for all properties.

parent_property_id.description: ID of parent property in hierarchy (e.g., Visit's parent is Epoch). Derived from hierarchical_level relationships. null for top-level properties.

child_property_ids.description: IDs of child properties. Derived from hierarchical_level relationships. Empty array for leaf properties.

annotation_markers.description: Comma-separated annotation markers. Preserved from extraction.

linked_annotation_ids.description: IDs of annotations linked to this property. Derived by matching annotation_markers to annotations array.

schedule_column.description: A resolved schedule column representing a single timepoint/visit column in the table. Columns are implicit in extraction (derived from grid positions); made explicit here for downstream use.

column_id.description: Stable identifier for this column (e.g., 'col-002'). Generated sequentially by column_position.

column_position.description: Physical column position. Column 1 is typically row labels; schedule columns start at 2+.

is_label_column.description: true if this is the row label column (typically column 1), not a schedule data column

column_values.description: Hierarchical property values for this column, ordered by hierarchical_level. Represents the full timepoint identification (e.g., ['Treatment', 'Visit 3', 'Day 15']).

property_id.description: Reference to the schedule_property this value belongs to

value.description: The cell value at this property level for this column

is_merged.description: true if this value came from a merged cell spanning multiple columns

merge_span.description: If merged, the column range this value spans

annotation_markers.description: Annotation markers on this specific cell value

composite_label.description: Human-readable composite label joining all hierarchical values (e.g., 'Treatment / Visit 3 / Day 15'). Generated for convenience.

activity.description: A resolved activity with stable ID and explicit parent-child relationships derived from indentation_level.

activity_id.description: Stable identifier for this activity (e.g., 'act-015'). Generated sequentially by row_position.

row_position.description: Physical row position preserved from extraction

hierarchy_level.description: Hierarchy level derived from source indentation. 0 = section header/top-level, 1 = child, 2 = grandchild, etc.

is_section_header.description: true if this activity is a grouping header (typically indentation_level 0, bold, no schedule data). Derived from indentation + formatting + schedule data presence.

parent_activity_id.description: ID of parent activity in hierarchy. Derived by scanning backward for lower indentation_level. null for top-level activities.

child_activity_ids.description: IDs of direct child activities. Derived from indentation_level relationships. Empty array for leaf activities.

has_schedule_data.description: true if this activity has any non-empty cells in the schedule grid. Derived from activity_schedule array. Section headers typically false.

annotation_markers.description: Annotation markers on activity name. Preserved from extraction.

linked_annotation_ids.description: IDs of annotations linked to this activity. Derived by matching annotation_markers.

activity_schedule_value.description: A resolved schedule value at an activity × column intersection. Now uses IDs instead of positions for cross-referencing.

row_position.description: Original row position. Preserved for traceability.

column_position.description: Original column position. Preserved for traceability.

cell_value.description: Schedule indicator (clean). Empty string for no data.

cell_value_type.description: Classification of cell content. Derived during resolution. 'marker'=X,✓,•; 'timing_text'=Week 4, Day 1-3; 'frequency'=Daily, PRN; 'continuation'=→, ...; 'conditional'=if/as needed; 'empty'=no data.

source_range.description: If from merged cell expansion, original column range. Preserved from extraction.

annotation_markers.description: Annotation markers on this cell. Preserved from extraction.

linked_annotation_ids.description: IDs of annotations linked to this cell. Derived by matching annotation_markers.

annotation.description: A resolved annotation with stable ID and explicit element cross-references.

annotation_id.description: Stable identifier for this annotation (e.g., 'annot-001'). Generated sequentially.

annotation_marker.description: The marker symbol. Preserved from extraction.

annotation_text.description: Full annotation text. Preserved from extraction.

annotation_scope.description: Scope of what this annotation qualifies. Derived from referenced_elements. 'table'=applies to entire table; 'column'=specific timepoint(s); 'activity'=specific activity(ies); 'cell'=specific intersections; 'multiple'=mixed scope.

referenced_elements.description: Explicit cross-references to elements this annotation qualifies. Derived from marker_locations in extraction.

property_ids.description: Schedule properties this annotation is attached to

column_ids.description: Schedule columns this annotation is attached to

activity_ids.description: Activities this annotation is attached to

cell_references.description: Specific activity × column cells this annotation is attached to

marker_locations.description: Original marker locations. Preserved from extraction for traceability.

resolution_metadata.description: Metadata about the resolution process. Tracks provenance from extraction through resolution.

resolver.description: Tool or person who performed resolution. E.g., 'soa-resolver-v1.0', 'Manual-KL'

extraction_status.description: Status of source extraction when resolution was performed

validation_results.description: Results of validation checks performed during resolution

structure_valid.description: All row/column positions consistent and complete

hierarchy_valid.description: All parent-child relationships form valid trees

annotations_valid.description: All annotation markers resolved to annotation definitions

validation_errors.description: Fatal issues that must be addressed

resolution_status.description: Outcome of resolution. 'resolved'=complete, no issues; 'resolved_with_warnings'=complete but has warnings; 'failed'=could not resolve, see errors.

ready_for_integration.description: true if this resolved table is ready for multi-table integration in study-schedule-logic layer

resolution_notes.description: Notes about resolution decisions or issues encountered

extraction_metadata_preserved.description: Original extraction metadata preserved for full provenance chain

extraction_metadata.description: Original extraction metadata preserved for provenance

table_metadata.description: Enhanced table metadata with table_id and derived counts

schedule_properties.description: Resolved schedule properties with IDs and hierarchy relationships

schedule_columns.description: Resolved schedule columns - the temporal dimension made explicit with composite values

activities.description: Resolved activities with IDs and parent-child relationships

activity_schedule.description: Schedule values now using ID references instead of just positions

annotations.description: Resolved annotations with IDs and explicit element cross-references
